title: corylus balcana f. atropurpurea
intro: Corylus balcana f. atropurpurea is a variant of the Balkan hazel tree (Corylus balcana), a deciduous shrub or small tree native to the Balkan Peninsula. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Corylus balcana f. atropurpurea include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as supporting immune function and fighting oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, tinctures, and decoctions, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other remedies.
